title: Mnemonic vestment
summary: Once daily cast from a carried written source if the spell is on the spontaneous caster's list and matches slot type.
disposition: GM must rule whether CR-09 satisfies the class-list requirement

title: Otherworldly kimono
summary: Grants +4 on all caster-level checks and a daily no-initial-save maze effect; bonus rises while occupied.
disposition: Resolve body slot and wealth

title: Bead of karma
summary: Raises caster level by 4 for 10 minutes once daily as part of a prayer-bead strand.
disposition: Acquire for scheduled dispel and SR sequences

title: Ring of Continuation replacement rule
summary: A later personal-range spell can replace an older ring-maintained spell after its natural duration has expired.
disposition: Verify Invoke Deity routine and table interpretation

title: Four-leaf clover
summary: Three daily free-action +2 luck boosts to an ability check save or skill check; usable outside turn.
disposition: Would become +4 under CR-01 and CR-02 but does not stack with other luck bonuses

title: Borrow Fortune
summary: Immediate-action best-of-two reroll followed by two rounds of worst-of-two d20 rolls.
disposition: Emergency use only

title: Temporal Celerity
summary: Roll initiative twice and later always act during surprise rounds.
disposition: Time mystery access required

title: Rewind Time
summary: Limited immediate-action personal rerolls.
disposition: Time mystery and level access required

title: Dual-Cursed Misfortune and Fortune
summary: Adds forced and personal rerolls but imposes a second curse and replaces class benefits.
disposition: Full archetype and retraining audit required

title: Official retraining
summary: Defines retraining for feats class features racial traits skill ranks and spontaneous spells known.
disposition: Use only if GM adopts official subsystem

title: Page of spell knowledge
summary: Permanently adds one carried page's spell to usable spontaneous options if on class list.
disposition: CR-09 class-list ruling required

title: Background Skills
summary: Grants two background ranks per level and classifies Profession as background.
disposition: Campaign-wide adoption only

title: Signature Skill Profession
summary: At 10 ranks roll twice on Profession checks and take the better result.
disposition: Adopt Skill Unlocks and confirm ship-check interaction

title: Siege Engineer
summary: Proficiency with all siege weapons and protection from ordinary natural-1 mishaps.
disposition: Audit class-granted proficiency and current feats

title: Master Siege Engineer
summary: Crew loads and aims siege engines with move actions instead of full-round actions.
disposition: Audit prerequisites

title: Siege Commander
summary: Improves crew assembly and movement and halves assembly time.
disposition: Useful for deployable guns; less critical for fixed ship cannons

title: Corvus boarding device
summary: Vehicle-mounted hooked boarding bridge attaches after opposed driving checks.
disposition: Evaluate for marine boarding doctrine

title: Vehicle driving rules
summary: Profession sailor or Knowledge nature drives many sailing vessels.
disposition: Campaign workbook remains authoritative

title: Sounon downtime infrastructure
summary: Waterfront docks shipbuilding Magical Repository Hospital Sailors teams managers and follower labor.
disposition: Adopt as planning framework only with GM approval

title: Contacts network
summary: Followers can operate as trusted named contacts and information sources.
disposition: Useful narrative layer without requiring full downtime economy

title: Call Beyond the Veil
summary: Calls a deceased spirit from an extraplanar location for questioning with severe check and backlash risks.
disposition: Communication only; does not free Aristea

title: Robe of arcane heritage
summary: Treats sorcerer level as four higher for bloodline powers and effects.
disposition: Check body slot and Dragon Disciple stacking

title: Saving Finale
summary: Immediate-action spell ends bardic performance so an affected ally can reroll a failed save.
disposition: Verify whether Roy already knows it

title: Brilliant Inspiration
summary: Target rolls twice on attacks ability checks and skill checks and takes the better result.
disposition: Verify whether Roy already knows it

title: Expanded Arcana
summary: Adds one spell known or two spells below the highest castable level.
disposition: Compare against pages of spell knowledge and retraining

title: Ring of Revelation
summary: Grants a contained revelation only to an oracle with the matching mystery; duplicates add one use when limited.
disposition: Life-mystery audit; cannot bypass mystery restriction

title: Undine racial options
summary: Includes Amphibious Hydrated Vitality Aquatic Ancestry and other water-focused options.
disposition: Audit current racial traits before recommending changes
